full_description: WaterReminder is an app that helps users stay hydrated by sending reminders to drink water throughout the day. It also tracks daily water intake and provides statistics on hydration levels. With WaterReminder, you can set customized reminders to drink water at specific times of the day, and track your progress over time. The app also allows you to set daily water intake goals and monitor your progress towards achieving them. Additionally, WaterReminder provides insights into your hydration levels, helping you identify patterns and make adjustments to your drinking habits. By using WaterReminder, you can develop a healthy habit of drinking enough water every day and improve your overall well-being.
